stemHtml: Some aircraft gas turbine engines are fitted with 2 gearboxes, to divide the load of the accessories. This supplemental gearbox is usually (1) _____ and (2) _____.

options.a: (1) high speed; (2) connected to the HP shaft.
options.b: (1) high speed; (2) connected to the LP shaft.
options.c: (1) low speed; (2) connected to the HP shaft.
options.d: (1) low speed; (2) connected to the LP shaft.
